confirmatory.role: FROZEN -- generate fresh tablebase-verified starts w/ a NEWLY pre-registered seed ONLY at confirmatory time; never reuse (seeds consumed: 777 2026-07-14 MCTS-readout; 778 2026-07-14 K16@200n; 779 2026-07-14 K16@800n; 780 2026-07-15 R2@1600n; 781 2026-07-15 committor@1600n)

canonical_start.role: THE toy start (Kaveh 2026-07-14): all data must be play-reachable from it
